task: Tier 0 x402 sandbox starter — config-driven gateway + SQLite logging + stats page + public feed

root.input: Spec: ~/Documents/x402/100-Sandbox-Starter/ (Build phases Tier 0, Config schema, Data model, Request logging middleware, Sandbox security additions) + verified @x402/*@2.18.0 API (Gateway server code.md)
root.output: Repo at ~/Documents/x402-sandbox: tested gateway; free /catalog + /feed, paid config-driven routes incl. contentDir, per-hit SQLite log, admin stats page. Exit: settled Base-Sepolia purchase visible on stats page + feed.

nodes.desc: Scaffold: git init, package.json (ESM, pinned @x402/*@2.18.0, hono, @hono/node-server, vitest, tsx, typescript), tsconfig, .gitignore, MIT LICENSE, dir layout (src/, test/, content/)

API probe: install deps, smoke-import every symbol we rely on (paymentMiddleware, x402ResourceServer, HTTPFacilitatorClient, registerExactEvmScheme, node:sqlite DatabaseSync, hono/basic-auth); fail fast if surface differs

Config module: parse+validate .env (PAY_TO, NETWORK, FACILITATOR_URL, ADMIN_PASSWORD, IP_SALT) and products.json (sku/title/price/route/contentPath|bundlePath|contentDir/mimeType); fail-fast rules from Config schema
resolveSafe guard: realpath containment, dotfile-segment deny, secret-extension deny (.env/.key/.pem), null on missing → 404-before-402
nodes.result: 12 tests green; resolveSafe + listSafe, symlink containment verified with real symlinks

nodes.desc: DB module (node:sqlite): schema products/requests/settlements, product seed/sync from config, insert helpers (sync settlement write, queued async request write), stat queries (total, daily7, conversion, top products, recent-sales-redacted)
nodes.result: 14 tests green; Store class, integer micro-USDC sums

nodes.desc: Routes builder: validated products → @x402/hono RoutesConfig (inject payTo + scheme:exact from env; contentDir → wildcard route; description/mimeType/extensions)

Request logger middleware (outer onion layer): classify unpaid_402/paid_200/error, salted ip hash, parse PAYMENT-RESPONSE header (tolerant: both names, base64 JSON, raw kept on parse miss), settlements row sync + requests row async

Free + paid handlers: /catalog (HTML+JSON, scans contentDir via resolveSafe rules), /feed (redacted recent sales), paid file/dir serving with existence pre-check mounted BEFORE paymentMiddleware (404-before-402)
Admin stats page behind hono/basic-auth: products/sales/requests surfaces + conversion tile, server-rendered
nodes.result: 4 tests green; adminApp behind basicAuth, XSS-escaped; tx hash shown in requests table (recentSales lacks column — revisit in Tier1 CRUD)

nodes.desc: server.ts assembly: env fail-fast, facilitator client + resource server + exact-EVM scheme, onion order (logger → 404-precheck → paymentMiddleware → handlers), middleware-indirection hot reload on products.json fs.watch, bind 127.0.0.1:8402
nodes.output: src/server.ts + integration test (real HTTP, mocked facilitator)

nodes.desc: E2E on Base Sepolia: start server, buyer via @x402/fetch + funded dev wallet → settled purchase appears on stats page + feed; pin PAYMENT-RESPONSE parse to observed shape (spec todo)
README (attribution: dabit3 MIT lift, proxy402 design-inspiration note), demo content, initial git commit

thought_experiment: RISK: PAYMENT-RESPONSE header name/shape unverified (spec todo) — n7 parser built tolerant, n11 pins it against live testnet
ORDERING: 404-precheck must mount BEFORE paymentMiddleware or buyers can pay for missing files — n8/n10 interface contract
CHECK in n2: node:sqlite DatabaseSync unflagged in Node 24
Hot reload: fs.watch fires multiple events → debounce; rebuild swaps middleware ref, never re-binds server
E2E needs funded Sepolia USDC wallet — may need a manual faucet step; n11 reports to user if so
